name: attribute
title: attribute
description: The types of attributes for distributed objects.
These types are not available for user declarations.

parameters.name: int32
parameters.description: 32-Bit signed integer attribute. Access requires type long in CAPL.

parameters.name: unit32
parameters.description: 32-Bit unsigned integer attribute. Access requires type dword in CAPL.

parameters.name: int64
parameters.description: 64-Bit signed integer attribute. Access requires type int64 in CAPL.

parameters.name: unit64
parameters.description: 64-Bit unsigned integer attribute. Access requires type qword in CAPL.

parameters.name: doube
parameters.description: 64-Bit floating point attribute. Access requires type double in CAPL.

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String attribute. Access requires a large enough char array in CAPL.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
